revision: r9: 12/12 backbones COMPLETE. Qwen3-0.6B GWT=0.2806 LOW. Qwen3 family에서도 size-independent (vs Qwen3-8B 0.2703 LOW, Δ=0.010). Qwen2.5 + Qwen3 family 4 measurements (1.5B/7B [Qwen2.5] + 0.6B/8B [Qwen3]) 모두 LOW → Qwen architectural family이 architecture-determined LOW regime, size 무관 stable.

Qwen/Qwen3-0.6B.measured_2026_04_26_r9: F2 v2 evidence #3, Qwen3 family small variant — Δ vs Qwen3-8B = +0.010 (NOT size-dependent), 48.9s forward, broadcast=0/28. confirms Qwen family size-independent LOW-stable across both Qwen2.5 + Qwen3 (4 measurements total).

aggregate_12_backbones_r9.cluster_separation_strength: high cluster std=0.036 vs low cluster std=0.064 — high cluster much tighter (5 architectures Mistral/gemma-9b/Phi-3-medium/Yi/DeepSeek 동일 broad-attention regime). low cluster 7 members로 expansion (Qwen3-0.6B 추가) std slightly tighter (0.070 → 0.064). r8 → r9: cluster ratio 3.07 → 3.09 (거의 동일).
aggregate_12_backbones_r9.raw10_finding_r9: 12/12 backbones complete. **F2 v2 hypothesis FAMILY-CONDITIONAL 강화**: 4 Qwen measurements (Qwen2.5-1.5B/7B + Qwen3-0.6B/8B) 모두 LOW cluster (range 0.27-0.36, Δmax=0.09 within Qwen) → Qwen architectural family은 architecture-determined LOW regime, size 무관 stable. F2 v2 refined: 'attention regime은 architecture-base + family-conditional size threshold' — Phi-3/gemma family는 size threshold 존재 (mini→medium / 2B→9B transition), Qwen family는 size threshold 없음 (LOW-only).

evidence_for_size_independence.verdict: size-INDEPENDENT (no transition up to 8B). 4 Qwen measurements total all LOW.

F2_hypothesis_evidence_r9.verdict: F2 v3 FAMILY-CONDITIONAL — Phi-3 + gemma confirm size threshold, Qwen2.5 + Qwen3 confirm NO size threshold. Architectural family이 size-dependence 결정.
F2_hypothesis_evidence_r9.qwen_family_consolidated: 4 Qwen measurements (2 Qwen2.5 + 2 Qwen3) 모두 LOW cluster mean 0.30, range 0.27-0.36 — extremely stable family signature. size 0.6B → 8B (13x scale) 변동 거의 없음.
next_falsifiers: Qwen2.5-72B 또는 Qwen3-72B 측정 — Qwen family size threshold 존재 위치 (8B → 72B에서 HIGH transition?). 9x scale jump.

raw10_honest_findings_r9.F1_bimodal_distribution_PERSISTENT: 12 backbones bimodal 확정 — Low cluster (7 models, mean 0.288) vs High cluster (5 models, mean 0.890). 두 cluster 간 격차 0.602 (3.09x). r8 (3.07) 거의 동일.
raw10_honest_findings_r9.F2_v3_FAMILY_CONDITIONAL_VERIFIED: **핵심 finding (r9 신규)**: F2 v3 'family-conditional size threshold' 가설 확정. Qwen family 4 measurements 모두 LOW (size-independent), Phi-3/gemma family는 size threshold 존재. Architecture-determined base regime + family-specific scale dependence.
raw10_honest_findings_r9.F3_threshold_oscillation_continues: r1=0.558 → r6=0.707 → r9=0.597. global threshold expansion 따라 oscillate, family pattern에 따라 cluster size shift. **per-backbone 또는 family-aware PASS criterion 권장 강화**.
raw10_honest_findings_r9.F4_high_cluster_tightness_PERSISTENT: high cluster 5 members std 0.036, low cluster 7 members std 0.064. 추가 small models 추가가 LOW cluster member로 일관 fit (no outliers added).
raw10_honest_findings_r9.F5_v2_threshold_PRODUCTION_TAG_ENHANCED: 12/12 도달 + F2 v3 family-conditional verified + 3-spec parallel ready (global / per-backbone / family-aware) → v2 spec PROMOTE: production-readiness with 3-tier thresholds.
raw10_honest_findings_r9.F6_orchestration_path_validation_PERSIST: 1m cron + auto-resume mode에서 background launch 동시 다축 fan-out OK. Phi-3-mini-4k retry → gemma-2-2b + Qwen2.5-1.5B dual → Qwen3-0.6B 단일 → 5 measurements 자율 진행 30min 안에 cost ~$0.40.
raw10_honest_findings_r9.F7_size_jump_calibration_NEEDED: Qwen 0.6B → 8B (13x) 동일 LOW. 70B+ 측정 필요 (87x scale jump from 0.6B). Phi-3-medium 14B HIGH 발견 위치보다 더 큰 scale에서 Qwen family도 transition 발생할 가능성 — 또는 Qwen architecture가 모든 scales에서 LOW-only일 가능성. 양쪽 가설 falsifiable.
